name: Guardian Greaves
description: One of many holy instruments constructed to honor the Omniscience.

abilities.name: Mend
abilities.description: Applies a basic dispel on the caster and restores health and replenishes mana to nearby allies on cast. Cooldown: 45. Radius: 1200. Heal: 325. Mana Replenished: 200. Stack Limit Duration: 44.

abilities.name: Guardian Aura
abilities.description: Increases the health regeneration and mana regeneration of nearby allies. Radius: 1200. Health Regeneration Bonus: 2.5. Mana Regeneration Bonus: 1.5. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Health Threshold: 25%. Health Regeneration Bonus: 14.5.
